chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 784 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.3052/2024 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sajjad Muhammad Zangejo, Advocate for Respondents 1 to 7, 9 and 10 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner while placing on record copy of Appeal preferred by the Petitioner to Respondent No.1 submits that the Appeal of the Petitioner is pending before Respondent No.1 / Chairman, State Life Insurance Corporation, which has not been decided. He submits that the Petitioner would be satisfied and will not press instant Constitutional Petition, if directions are issued to Respondent No.1 to decide the Appeal of the Petitioner within a shortest possible time, which is not opposed by Counsel for the Respondents/State Life Insurance Corporation as well as learned DAG. Under the circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of along with listed application with direction to Respondent No.1/Chairman, State Life Insurance Corporation to decide the Appeal preferred by the Petitioner within 30 (thirty) days (if pending), after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
